chain_of_thought_evaluation.Q1_analysis: The paper provides a link to the GitHub repository containing the code used in the evaluation.
chain_of_thought_evaluation.Q2_analysis: The evaluation uses simulations with real network stacks (Mininet) and wide-area networks (AWS regions).
chain_of_thought_evaluation.Q3_analysis: A formal fault model is not explicitly provided, but the authors discuss various assumptions made throughout the paper.
chain_of_thought_evaluation.Q4_analysis: The paper provides a rigorous analysis of the performance trade-offs, including quantifying the exact cost of replication and checkpointing overhead.

major_weakness: The paper lacks a formal definition of the fault model, which may impact its applicability and reproducibility.
